title: Mason Cash Cane Collection Beige 24 Centimetre Chip Resistant Earthenware Mixing Bowl
features: A BAKERS BOWL | Made from earthenware, the Mason Cash Cane mixing bowls have a distinct patterned exterior and a rim designed to help bakers grip and tip the bowl, while the wide shallow shape allows for kneading within the bowl. Light enough to hold in one arm while mixing, but sturdy enough when used on the countertop, making it the perfect bowl for home or professional bakers.
CAPACITY | The Size 24 Cane Mixing bowl measures 24 centimetres, making this a perfect size for dough, pastry, cake or cookie mixes.
DURABILITY | Made from high-quality earthenware, this mixing bowl is microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe.

CANE | The Mason Cash Cane collection includes the iconic mixing bowls alongside a variety of must-have coordinating kitchen accessories such as measuring jugs, spoons and batter bowls. This comprehensive range combines the unique quality and heritage of Mason Cash and features everything from food preparation items to storage solutions and ovenware.

MASON CASH HERITAGE | Mason Cash has been the choice brand of home cooks and bakers for centuries, with the iconic Mason Cash Mixing Bowl dating back to 1901. Standing the test of time, the brand offers a beautiful selection of kitchenware, cookware, tabletop items, pet bowls, and cake-decorating equipment.
